ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the video */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "video_title_loc" TEXT /* Localized title of the video */,
  "channel_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the channel that uploaded the video */,
  "video_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "video_search_category_id" INTEGER /* Search category ID for the video */,
  "video_category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the video */,
  "video_trending_rank" INTEGER /* Trending rank of the video */,
  "video_query_time" TEXT /* Time when the video data was queried */,
  "caption_lang" TEXT /* Language of the video captions */,
  "caption_type" TEXT /* Type of captions available for the video */,
  "assignable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the video can be assigned to a team or individual for analysis */,
  "monetization_status" TEXT /* Monetization status of the video (e.g., monetized, not monetized) */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "video_published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was published */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  "thumbnails" TEXT /* Thumbnails for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_video_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_category_id") REFERENCES video_categories ("video_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the channel */,
  "channel_title" TEXT /* Title of the channel */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers the channel has */,
  "channel_created" TEXT /* Date when the channel was created */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the channel */,
  "channel_country" TEXT /* Country where the channel is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "video_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the video category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the video category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the video category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being assigned */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the team or individual the video is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the assignment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_accessibility" (
  "accessibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the accessibility record */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video */,
  "caption_lang" TEXT /* Language of the video captions */,
  "caption_type" TEXT /* Type of captions available for the video */,
  "transcript_available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a transcript is available for the video */,
  "audio_description_available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether an audio description is available for the video */,
  "sign_language_available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether sign language is available for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_accessibility_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "member_email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_items" (
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the action item */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the action item belongs to */,
  "action_item" TEXT /* Description of the action item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action item (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("analysis_id")
)
